2605.09259.title: Remix the Timbre: Diffusion-Based Style Transfer Across Polyphonic Stems
2605.09259.paper_summary: Timbre transfer aims to modify the timbral identity of a musical recording while preserving the original melody and rhythm. While single-instrument timbre transfer has made substantial progress, existing approaches to multi-instrument settings rely on separate-then-transfer pipelines that propagate source separation artifacts and produce incoherent synthesized timbres across stems. This paper proposes MixtureTT, to the best of our knowledge the first system for flexible per-stem timbre transfer directly from a polyphonic mixture. Given a mixture and a separate timbre reference for each target voice, MixtureTT jointly transfers all stems to the specified instruments through a shared diffusion process. Modeling the dependencies across the per-stem content and cross-stem harmonic, the proposed joint stem diffusion transformer eliminates cascaded separation error, reduces inference cost by a factor equal to the number of stems, and yields more coherent multi-stem outputs. Despite operating under a strictly harder input condition, evaluations on the SATB choral dataset show that MixtureTT outperforms single-instrument baselines on both objective and subjective metrics demonstrating the necessity of dedicated multi-instrument timbre transfer over the naive separate-then-transfer pipelines. As a result, this work confirms that the cross-stem modeling is essential for mixture-level timbre transfer as the proposed joint setting consistently exceeds an equivalent single-stem ablation.
2605.09259.paper_summary_zh: 音色轉換旨在修改音樂錄音的音色特徵，同時保留原始的旋律和節奏。雖然單一樂器的音色轉換已取得顯著進展，但現有的多樂器設置方法依賴於分開然後轉換的流程，這會傳播源分離的工件並在不同音軌上產生不一致的合成音色。本文提出了MixtureTT，據我們所知，這是第一個能夠靈活進行每個音軌音色轉換的系統，直接從多聲部混合中進行。給定一個混合音訊和每個目標聲部的獨立音色參考，MixtureTT通過共享的擴散過程共同將所有音軌轉換為指定的樂器。通過建模每個音軌內容和跨音軌和聲之間的依賴性，所提出的聯合音軌擴散變換器消除了級聯分離誤差，將推理成本降低到與音軌數量相等的因子，並產生更一致的多音軌輸出。儘管在嚴格的更難輸入條件下運作，但在SATB合唱數據集上的評估顯示，MixtureTT在客觀和主觀指標上均優於單一樂器基準，證明了專門的多樂器音色轉換比天真的分開然後轉換流程更具必要性。因此，這項工作確認了跨音軌建模對於混合層級音色轉換的重要性，因為所提出的聯合設置始終超過了相應的單音軌消融。
2605.09259.author: Leduo Chen et.al.
2605.09259.authors: Leduo Chen, Junchuan Zhao, Shengchen Li
